  3. Lucy Kovalova

Slovakia / United States scene

Lucy Kovalova

Reach, counters, and elite doubles positioning

Biography

Lucy Kovalova, originally from Slovakia, has long been associated with elite doubles and mixed-doubles play. Her height, reach, and countering ability make her a strong model for understanding lane control, disciplined blocking, and how a taller player can compress space at the kitchen line.

Major skills

Doubles positioningCounter reachMixed doubles systemsKitchen stabilityBlocking lanes

Career notes

  • PPA profile lists women’s, mixed, and singles participation.
  • Long-time doubles and mixed doubles standout.
  • Personal site describes her as one of the best women’s professional players in the game.

Events

Women’s doublesMixed doublesSingles spot starts

Paddle / sponsor line

ONIX Evoke Premier / sponsored line history varies

What to study

Study her spacing and patience at the kitchen line.
